scripts.check: node --check app.js && node --check frame-driver.js && node --check route-state.js && node --check tower-ship-factory.js && node --check lab-controller.js && node --check validate-action-ready.mjs && node --check validate-routes.mjs && node --check test-contract.mjs && node --check test-frame-driver.mjs && node --check test-pixel-readback.mjs && node --check capture-hook.mjs && python3 ../../scripts/validate_sculpt_spec.py object-sculpt-spec.json --strict-quality
scripts.validate:unit: node test-contract.mjs && node test-frame-driver.mjs && node test-pixel-readback.mjs && node validate-routes.mjs
scripts.validate:quick: npm run check && npm run validate:unit && npm run test:mutations
scripts.validate:full: npm run validate:quick && npm run validate:artifacts
